description: PR3 scenario #2 — cold-start trace capture. A small 3-section board with enough candidate slots that every placed section has at least two rejected alternatives. After commit 3, decision_trace[section_code] must contain chosen + at least 1 alternative per section; trace coverage on this fixture must be 100%.
notes: Acceptance-bar #1: ≥90% trace coverage. This fixture asserts 100% on a small obviously-traceable scenario; broader-pack fixtures allow the 90% floor.
